scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @br-validators/core test:coverage && pnpm --filter @br-validators/cli test:coverage && pnpm --filter @br-validators/zod test:coverage && pnpm --filter @br-validators/react-hook-form test:coverage && pnpm --filter @br-validators/express test:coverage && pnpm --filter @br-validators/vue test:coverage
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @br-validators/core build && pnpm -r --sequential typecheck && pnpm typecheck:scripts
scripts.verify: pnpm --filter @br-validators/core build && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm test:scripts && pnpm test:integration && pnpm build
